Notice Of Motion To Set Aside The Court'S December 3, 2024 Sanctions Orders Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 473(B), Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jan-14-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF BRIAN WHITE's Motion To Set Aside The Court's December 3, 2024 Sanctions Orders Pursuant To Code Of Civil Procedure Section 473(B).

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. The movant is to comply with SF Local Rule 3.0C(3) and file an ex parte in department 610.

Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)
